meta.notes: The 'act on it' half of the feature-usage loop: when a coaching module keeps firing but the token owner rarely acts on it, the endpoint sends one push with a one-tap Mute / Keep. It self-gates to at most one nudge per ISO week per user (and only when a module is actually firing-but-ignored), so a frequent poll is fine. Uses the caller's per-user token, so it nudges that user. Prefer the native launchd twin (deploy/com.prefrontal-usage.plist, `prefrontal usage check --deliver --all-users`) for a multi-user box; if you enable this workflow instead, keep only one active to avoid a double nudge.
